# Third-party libraries

## stb_image.h

Single-header image loading library by Sean Barrett, vendored unmodified from
[github.com/nothings/stb](https://github.com/nothings/stb).

Licensed under a dual MIT License / public domain (Unlicense) — see the license
block at the bottom of `stb_image.h`. Used by the engine's `Texture` module to
decode PNG assets at load time.
